description: ai domain fully migrated to tools/ai/
steps: Check that tools/ai/claude/ contains install, deploy, and config/
Run tools/ai/claude/deploy and verify it completes without path errors
Verify no files remain in scripts/install/ai/, scripts/deploy/ai/, config/ai/

description: audio domain fully migrated to tools/audio/
steps: Check that tools/audio/ contains one folder per tool
Check that tools/audio/install-all exists and calls each tool's install via relative path
Verify no files remain in scripts/install/audio/, config/audio/

description: basics domain fully migrated to tools/basics/
steps: Check that tools/basics/ contains one folder per tool
Pick one tool with both install and deploy, verify install calls deploy at the end
Verify no files remain in scripts/install/basics/, scripts/deploy/basics/, config/basics/

description: cli domain fully migrated to tools/cli/
steps: Check that tools/cli/bat/, tools/cli/rg/, tools/cli/fd/ each contain install, deploy, config/
Check tools/cli/rg/deploy uses $(dirname "$0")/config (not hardcoded path)
Verify no files remain in scripts/install/cli/, scripts/deploy/cli/, config/cli/

description: docker domain fully migrated to tools/docker/
steps: Check that tools/docker/ contains one folder per tool
Verify no files remain in scripts/install/docker/, config/docker/

description: git domain fully migrated to tools/git/
steps: Check tools/git/git/ contains install, deploy, config/
Verify tools/git/git/install calls $(dirname "$0")/deploy at end
Verify no files remain in scripts/install/git/, scripts/deploy/git/, config/git/

description: image domain fully migrated to tools/image/
steps: Check tools/image/flameshot/ and tools/image/imagemagick/ each have install, deploy, config/
Check tools/image/install-all exists and uses relative paths
Verify no files remain in scripts/install/image/, scripts/deploy/image/, config/image/

description: infrastructure domain fully migrated to tools/infrastructure/
steps: Check that tools/infrastructure/ contains one folder per tool
Verify no files remain in scripts/install/infrastructure/, config/infrastructure/

description: keybindings domain fully migrated to tools/keybindings/
steps: Check that tools/keybindings/ contains one folder per tool
Pick one tool with both install and deploy, verify install calls deploy at the end
Verify no files remain in scripts/install/keybindings/, scripts/deploy/keybindings/, config/keybindings/
Check that tools/_languages/ contains one folder per language tool
Pick one tool with both install and deploy, verify install calls deploy at the end
Verify no files remain in scripts/install/_languages/, scripts/deploy/_languages/, config/_languages/

description: misc domain fully migrated to tools/misc/
steps: Check that tools/misc/ contains one folder per tool
Verify no files remain in scripts/install/misc/, scripts/deploy/misc/, config/misc/

description: ubuntu domain fully migrated to tools/ubuntu/
steps: Check tools/ubuntu/24.04/ contains sub-feature folders (autostart, keybindings, etc.)
Pick one feature, verify its deploy uses $(dirname "$0")/config
Verify no files remain in scripts/install/ubuntu/, scripts/deploy/ubuntu/, config/ubuntu/

description: vim domain fully migrated to tools/vim/
steps: Check tools/vim/nvim/ and tools/vim/vint/ each have install, deploy, config/
Verify both installs call deploy at the end
Verify no files remain in scripts/install/vim/, scripts/deploy/vim/, config/vim/

description: windows domain fully migrated to tools/windows/
steps: Check that tools/windows/ contains one folder per tool
Verify no files remain in scripts/install/windows/, config/windows/

description: worktools domain fully migrated to tools/worktools/
steps: Check that tools/worktools/ contains one folder per tool
Verify no files remain in scripts/install/worktools/, scripts/deploy/worktools/, config/worktools/

description: term domain fully migrated to tools/term/ with cross-tool refs updated
steps: Check tools/term/zsh/config/ contains the full ZSH config tree
Grep for '~/.oroshi/config/' inside tools/term/zsh/config/ — should return no results
Grep for '~/.oroshi/scripts/deploy/' inside tools/term/zsh/config/ — should return no results
Verify no files remain in scripts/install/term/, scripts/deploy/term/, config/term/

description: old directory trees deleted and no stale references remain
steps: Verify scripts/install/, scripts/deploy/, config/ no longer exist
Verify config/__archive/ no longer exists
Verify scripts/bin/, scripts/etc/, scripts/yarn/ still exist and are untouched
Run: grep -r '\.oroshi/config/' . --exclude-dir=docs --exclude-dir=.git -- should return no results
Run: grep -r '\.oroshi/scripts/install/' . --exclude-dir=docs --exclude-dir=.git -- should return no results
Run: grep -r '\.oroshi/scripts/deploy/' . --exclude-dir=docs --exclude-dir=.git -- should return no results
